title: Capitol Hill - Visit Seattle
content: ## This epicenter of LGBTQIA+ culture mixes cool long-standing hangouts with the trendiest eateries and boutiques along with public art and green spaces galore. A large abstract sculpture sits beside a reflecting pool in the Capitol Hill neighborhood, with three people on the edge enjoying a sunny, partly cloudy day. Stroll through the graceful Olmsted Brothers–designed Volunteer Park, a 50-acre oasis of trees and paths with an amphitheater. It’s home to the Seattle Asian Art Museum and the lush, glass-paneled Volunteer Park Conservatory. Capitol Hill’s nightlife boasts live music clubs like Neumos and many LGBTQIA+ bars, among them Queer/Bar and the Cuff Complex. ###### Seattle Pride. The top of the Space Needle in Seattle with a rainbow pride flag flying at the peak against a cloudy sky. Explore ways to connect with people and organizations across Seattle throughout the month—and beyond. Break out your colors and discover how Seattle is a City of Pride every day. #### Seattle’s best every month in your inbox.
